headline: Coinbase Leans Into DeFi Infrastructure With Chainlink DataLink Integration
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) is integrating its onchain exchange data directly with Chainlink’s DataLink oracle infrastructure. The move brings institutional-grade pricing and market data from Coinbase into DeFi protocols, with a focus on transparency and risk management. This data expansion comes as Coinbase faces regulatory threats to its stablecoin-related yield business and looks to build new onchain infrastructure revenue streams. For you as an investor, this integration highlights...
